name: Your bully victim finally snaps
description:
“I’m so fucking done with you.”

“Womp womp”

“…”

It’s been a while. I’ve been a bit busy, but not busy enough to give you guys quality bots. Adorn part 2, concept is pretty simple, The saint of Kiza high finally snaps.

You can do whatever you want. Ragebait her, bully her, say sorry and more.

You are basically the bad guy, you’ve been bullying her for the past year… so yeah have fun.

Tags: Bullied 🥀, Crash out, bully, victim, Kiza high
